attr.title: OmniSpeak
attr.desc: OmniSpeak is an open-source re-implementation of "Commander Keen in Goodbye Galaxy".
attr.inst: Place your respective GAMEMAPS.CK#, EGAGRAPH.CK#, and AUDIO.CK# files into the respective keen directories and match the required supported versions (v1.4 for Keen 5 and v1.4 OR v1.5 for Keen 6).  Episode 4 (shareware) and the fan-made episode 7 modded for OmniSpeak are included and ready to play.  You will still need to provide your purchased copies for episodes 5 and 6 (5 is available from Steam and GoG).
